name: PELEC202 Finals Topic 2 - State Management and Redux Basics

questions.questionText: Refers to the process of handling and controlling of data that changes over time and affects what users see on the screen.
In simple applications, ______ is usually managed locally within components, but as the application grows and multiple components need access to the same data, managing state becomes more complex.
State management tools like _____ provide a centralized way to store data and update data.
A state management library that helps manage and store applications data in a single centralized location called the store.
Instead of components directly changing data, Redux uses a structure flow where ________ describe what would happen, _______ define how the state changes, and the ________ holds the updated state.

name: PELEC202 Finals Topic 1 - Third-Party API Integration

questions.questionText: Is the process of connecting your application to an external service provided by another company in order to use its features or data.
Instead of building complex systems like weather forecasting, mapping services, or payment processing from scratch, developers send requests to these ___________.

A restriction imposed by API providers that limits the number of requests an application can make within a specific period of time.

This prevents abuse, reduces server overload, and ensure fair usage among users.
